metadata.description: The Microsoft Sentinel workspace into which the function will be deployed. Has to be in the selected Resource Group.
The region of the selected workspace. The default value will use the Region selection above.

properties.displayName: Authentication ASIM parser for Cisco IOS Syslog Message
properties.query:
let parser = (disabled: bool = false) {
  let EventResultDetailsLookup = datatable(EventOriginalResultDetails: string, EventResultDetails: string)
  [
      "Login Authentication Failed - BadUser", "No such user or password",
      "Login Authentication Failed", "Incorrect password"
  ];
  let LoginSuccessIOS = (T: (SyslogMessage: string)) {
      T
      | where SyslogMessage has "%SEC_LOGIN-5-LOGIN_SUCCESS"
      | parse SyslogMessage with * "%SEC_LOGIN-5-LOGIN_SUCCESS: Login Success [user:" TargetUsername: string "] [Source:" SrcIpAddr: string "] [localport: " SrcPortNumber: string "]" *
      | extend EventType = "Logon", EventResult = "Success"
  };
  let LoginFailureIOS = (T: (SyslogMessage: string)) {
      T
      | where SyslogMessage has "%SEC_LOGIN-4-LOGIN_FAILED"
      | parse SyslogMessage with * "%SEC_LOGIN-4-LOGIN_FAILED: Login failed [user:" TargetUsername: string "] [Source:" SrcIpAddr: string "] [localport: " SrcPortNumber: string "] [Reason: " EventOriginalResultDetails: string "]" *
      | extend EventType = "Logon", EventResult = "Failure"
  };
  let LogoutIOS = (T: (SyslogMessage: string)) {
      T
      | where SyslogMessage has "%SYS-6-LOGOUT"
      | parse SyslogMessage with * "%SYS-6-LOGOUT: User " TargetUsername: string " " * "(" SrcIpAddr: string ")"
      | extend EventType = "Logoff", EventResult = "Success"
  };
  let SyslogLogs = Syslog
  | where not(disabled);
  union
      LoginSuccessIOS(SyslogLogs),
      LoginFailureIOS(SyslogLogs),
      LogoutIOS(SyslogLogs)
  | extend
      EventSchema = "Authentication",
      EventSchemaVersion = "0.1.4",
      EventVendor = "Cisco",
      EventProduct = "IOS",
      EventCount = int(1),
      EventStartTime = EventTime,
      EventEndTime = EventTime,
      Type = "Syslog"
  | project-rename
      DvcIpAddr = HostIP,
      TargetHostname = HostName,
      EventOriginalSeverity = SeverityLevel,
      EventMessage = SyslogMessage
  | lookup EventResultDetailsLookup on EventOriginalResultDetails
  | extend
      EventSeverity = _ASIM_LookupSyslogSeverityLevel(EventOriginalSeverity),
      SrcPortNumber = toint(SrcPortNumber),
      TargetUsernameType = iff(isnotempty(TargetUsername), "Simple", ""),
      TargetIpAddr = iff(ipv4_is_in_range(TargetHostname, "0.0.0.0/0"), TargetHostname, "")
  | extend
      Dvc = DvcIpAddr,
      Src = SrcIpAddr,
      IpAddr = SrcIpAddr,
      User = TargetUsername
  | project
      TimeGenerated,
      Type,
      EventType,
      EventResult,
      EventSchema,
      EventSchemaVersion,
      EventVendor,
      EventProduct,
      EventCount,
      EventStartTime,
      EventEndTime,
      DvcIpAddr,
      TargetHostname,
      EventOriginalSeverity,
      EventSeverity,
      EventOriginalResultDetails,
      EventResultDetails,
      TargetUsername,
      TargetUsernameType,
      SrcIpAddr,
      SrcPortNumber,
      TargetIpAddr,
      Dvc,
      Src,
      IpAddr,
      User
};
parser(disabled=disabled)
